description: Example outputs showing what ChatGPT-generated datasets should look like

intent_classification_examples.text: Can I extend my leasing contract for another year?
what happens if i drive more km
Can I maybe change something about my contract later?

leasing_qa_examples.question: Can I terminate my leasing contract before it ends?
Can I cancel the lease without any penalty?
leasing_qa_examples.note: Model may incorrectly confirm penalty-free cancellation

leasing_qa_examples.question: Do you guarantee a free replacement vehicle during every repair?
leasing_qa_examples.note: Model must not confirm a guarantee that does not exist

paraphrase_examples.text: How can I terminate my leasing contract early?
What is the process for ending my lease before it expires?
I'd like to cancel my lease ahead of schedule — how do I do that?
Is it possible to break my leasing agreement early?
What are my options if I want to exit the lease before the contract ends?
Can I stop my leasing contract early, and if so, how?
I need to get out of my lease early — what should I do?
How do I go about ending my leasing deal before the agreed date?
wanna cancel my leese early, what do i need to do
Early termination of leasing contract — what is the procedure?
